message:
feat(rpc): normalize command type aliases and fix config proptest env precedence

**rpc.rs**: Add normalize_command_type() that maps camelCase and
kebab-case command type variants to their canonical snake_case form
(e.g., "followUp" → "follow_up", "get-state" → "get_state"). This
ensures RPC clients using different naming conventions all route to
the same handler, covering: follow-up, get-state, set-model,
set-steering-mode, set-follow-up-mode, set-auto-compaction, and
set-auto-retry command families.

**config.rs**: Fix proptest_extension_risk_alpha_finite_values_clamp to
account for environment variable precedence — when PI_EXTENSION_RISK_*
env vars are set (e.g., in CI), they override config-file values, so
the test now checks against the baseline env-resolved value instead of
assuming config always wins.

**storage.sqlite3**: Updated storage database.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
